title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Fabindia Online

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Fabindia Online
jsonLd.description:
Fabindia Online invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fabindia Online:
Fabindia Online is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
